forrestchang/andrej-karpathy-skills ·GitHub ⭐ 7355 · Claude-Code, CLAUDE.md, Prompt-Engineering, LLM-Coding, Best-Practices, Open-Source

What it is

A single CLAUDE.md (or Claude Code plugin) encoding four Karpathy-derived principles — Think Before Coding, Simplicity First, Surgical Changes, and Goal-Driven Execution — to fix common LLM coding anti-patterns.

Problems solved

  • Addresses LLMs silently making wrong assumptions
  • overcomplicating code with bloated abstractions
  • making unasked-for side-effect changes
  • and lacking verifiable success criteria
  • directly based on Andrej Karpathy's published criticisms of AI coders.

How to get started

Install as a Claude Code plugin: /plugin marketplace add forrestchang/andrej-karpathy-skills, then /plugin install andrej-karpathy-skills@karpathy-skills. Or copy-paste the CLAUDE.md file directly into any project or append it to an existing one.

Detailed report

1. Positioning

forrestchang/andrej-karpathy-skills is positioned as a a single claude.md (or claude code plugin) encoding four karpathy-derived principles — think before coding, simplicity first, surgical changes, and goal-driven execution — to fix common llm coding anti-patterns. It aims to provide developers with a robust, Various-based solution for no description provided.

2. Pain Points & Advantages

Traditional methods in this domain often suffer from Addresses LLMs silently making wrong assumptions. forrestchang/andrej-karpathy-skills addresses this by a single claude.md (or claude code plugin) encoding four karpathy-derived principles — think before coding, simplicity first, surgical changes, and goal-driven execution — to fix common llm coding anti-patterns, offering a significant performance boost and better developer ergonomics compared to existing alternatives.

3. Technical Architecture

The project is built using Various, adopting a modular and scalable design. It leverages modern industry standards to ensure compatibility across different environments, focusing on efficiency and ease of integration.

4. Core Implementation

Main logic revolves around no description provided. The implementation utilizes Various's strengths to provide a single claude.md (or claude code plugin) encoding four karpathy-derived principles — think before coding, simplicity first, surgical changes, and goal-driven execution — to fix common llm coding anti-patterns, ensuring high reliability and performance under load.

5. Code Organization

The repository is structured logically, with core functionality separated from utilities and examples. This organization facilitates easy navigation and contribution for developers looking to extend the tool's capabilities.

6. Quick Start Suggestion

To get started, install as a claude code plugin: /plugin marketplace add forrestchang/andrej-karpathy-skills, then /plugin install andrej-karpathy-skills@karpathy-skills. or copy-paste the claude.md file directly into any project or append it to an existing one. This will allow you to quickly evaluate the tool and integrate it into your existing development workflow.

7. Summary

An essential, Various-powered utility that streamlines no description provided; it effectively tackles Addresses LLMs silently making wrong assumptions while maintaining a high standard of code quality and usability.
